Package space.sunqian.fs.utils.jdbc

Interface PreparedSql

public interface PreparedSql
This interface represents a prepared SQL string with the specified parameters to be bound. It can be built from SqlBuilder.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default @Nonnull SqlInsert
    insert(@Nonnull Connection connection)
    Executes the SQL insert and returns the insert result as a SqlInsert.
    @Nonnull @Immutable List<Object>
    parameters()
    Returns the parameters to be bound to this prepared SQL.
    @Nonnull String
    preparedSql()
    Returns the prepared SQL string.
    default <T> @Nonnull SqlQuery<T>
    query(@Nonnull Class<T> type, @Nonnull Connection connection)
    Executes the SQL query and returns the query result set as a SqlQuery.
    default <T> @Nonnull SqlQuery<T>
    query(@Nonnull Type type, @Nonnull Connection connection)
    Executes the SQL query and returns the query result set as a SqlQuery.
    default <T> @Nonnull SqlQuery<T>
    query(@Nonnull TypeRef<T> type, @Nonnull Connection connection)
    Executes the SQL query and returns the query result set as a SqlQuery.
    default @Nonnull SqlUpdate
    update(@Nonnull Connection connection)
    Executes the SQL update and returns the update result as a SqlUpdate.

  • Method Details

    • preparedSql

      @Nonnull @Nonnull String preparedSql()
      Returns the prepared SQL string.
      Returns:
      the prepared SQL string

    • parameters

      @Nonnull @Immutable @Nonnull @Immutable List<Object> parameters()
      Returns the parameters to be bound to this prepared SQL.
      Returns:
      the parameters to be bound to this prepared SQL

    • query

      @Nonnull default <T> @Nonnull SqlQuery<T> query(@Nonnull @Nonnull Class<T> type, @Nonnull @Nonnull Connection connection) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Executes the SQL query and returns the query result set as a SqlQuery.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type mapped to the data row of the result set
      Parameters:
      type - the type mapped to the data row of the result set
      connection - the connection to create the statement to execute the query
      Returns:
      the query result set as a SqlQuery
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs

    • query

      @Nonnull default <T> @Nonnull SqlQuery<T> query(@Nonnull @Nonnull TypeRef<T> type, @Nonnull @Nonnull Connection connection) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Executes the SQL query and returns the query result set as a SqlQuery.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type mapped to the data row of the result set
      Parameters:
      type - the type reference mapped to the data row of the result set
      connection - the connection to create the statement to execute the query
      Returns:
      the query result set as a SqlQuery
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs

    • query

      @Nonnull default <T> @Nonnull SqlQuery<T> query(@Nonnull @Nonnull Type type, @Nonnull @Nonnull Connection connection) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Executes the SQL query and returns the query result set as a SqlQuery.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type mapped to the data row of the result set
      Parameters:
      type - the type mapped to the data row of the result set
      connection - the connection to create the statement to execute the query
      Returns:
      the query result set as a SqlQuery
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs

    • update

      @Nonnull default @Nonnull SqlUpdate update(@Nonnull @Nonnull Connection connection) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Executes the SQL update and returns the update result as a SqlUpdate.

      connection - the connection to create the statement to execute the query
      Returns:
      the update result as a SqlUpdate
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs

    • insert

      @Nonnull default @Nonnull SqlInsert insert(@Nonnull @Nonnull Connection connection) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Executes the SQL insert and returns the insert result as a SqlInsert.
      Parameters:
      connection - the connection to create the statement to execute the query
      Returns:
      the insert result as a SqlInsert
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs
